name: forge-state
description: Lab bench for open-source projects. Inbound intake from Slack 🧪 reactions plus wild-source harvesters (GitHub code search, RSS feeds, curated author watchlist). Nightly, forge researches, clones, builds inside a sealed Docker sandbox, runs an experiment, packages it into something runnable, and ships a writeup + deployable artifact. Includes forge-introspector — reads its own capability walls across published experiments and proposes work orders to overcome them. Build failures are kept as findings, not discarded.
